hero.title: First Aid Guide
hero.description: Browse concise educational first-aid reference topics, warning notes, prevention tips, bookmarks, and recently viewed guides. Not a substitute for emergency services or professional care.

flow.title: Browse -> Read -> Prepare
steps: Open concise educational guidance and warning notes
Bookmark topics for quick personal reference
Contact local emergency services or qualified professionals whenever needed

differences.title: Educational first-aid reference with clear limits
differences.description: First Aid Guide provides organized learning material. It does not replace emergency services, diagnose injuries or illness, recommend medication, provide personalized treatment, or dispatch help.

items.title: Organized topics
items.description: Browse first-aid references by practical category.

items.title: Clear warnings
items.description: Each guide includes emergency warning notes and what to avoid.

items.title: Responsible use
items.description: Use the guide for learning and contact local emergency services or qualified healthcare professionals when appropriate.

feel.title: A calm reference shelf for first-aid learning
feel.description: The workspace makes common first-aid topics easier to find while keeping emergency and professional-care boundaries visible.

items.title: Quick browsing
items.description: Search, filter, and sort first-aid topics.

items.title: Personal reference
items.description: Bookmark favourite topics and revisit recently opened guides.

items.title: Safety first
items.description: The app avoids diagnosis, treatment, medication, and dispatch claims.

audiences.title: Who uses First Aid Guide
audiences.description: Useful for people who want organized educational first-aid reference material before an emergency occurs.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Review basic awareness topics and prevention tips.

items.title: Families
items.description: Keep common reference topics easy to revisit.

items.title: Preparedness planners
items.description: Bookmark useful topics and review emergency preparedness guidance.

resourceSection.title: First-aid reference essentials
resourceSection.description: Concise educational content with safe boundaries.

items.title: Guides
items.description: Browse topics with summaries, steps, avoid lists, emergency warnings, prevention, and related topics.

items.title: Categories
items.description: Review organizational categories for first-aid reference topics.

items.title: Bookmarks
items.description: Save favourite guides for quick access.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review recently viewed, favourite, and most-viewed topics from personal history.

groupedSection.title: Learn and prepare without delaying care
groupedSection.description: Use the guide as educational reference only.

items.name: Search
items.description: Search by title, summary, category, and guide content.

items.name: Guidance
items.description: Read concise steps and prevention tips.

items.name: Emergency boundary
items.description: Call local emergency services or seek professional care when the situation calls for it.

technicalSection.title: Built for educational reference
technicalSection.description: First Aid Guide follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: No diagnosis, medication recommendation, personalized treatment, emergency dispatch, external medical APIs, or AI-generated advice.

finalCta.title: Ready to browse first-aid topics?
finalCta.description: Open the guide library and review educational reference material.
